message:
fix(config,package_manager): add risk config tests and fix local path detection edge cases

Config improvements:
- Add extension_risk_defaults_fail_closed() test verifying default config
  produces fail-closed risk posture for untrusted extensions
- Add extension_risk_config_can_disable_fail_closed_explicitly() test
  verifying explicit opt-out from fail-closed works correctly

Package manager fixes:
- looks_like_local_path() now recognizes bare "." and ".." as local paths
  (previously only handled ./ and ../ prefixes)
- Add Windows backslash support: recognize ".\\" and "..\\" prefixes
- Add corresponding unit tests for all new path patterns

Minor formatting:
- src/tools.rs: reformat multi-line condition for image size check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
